Home / Custom Streetwear Manufacturing in Pakistan

Custom Streetwear Manufacturing in Pakistan

Updated: July 1, 2026 | By FABRIOZA

Streetwear demands quality that speaks before your brand does. Heavyweight fabrics, precise construction, and finishes that get better with every wash. FABRIOZA is a streetwear manufacturer specializing in premium blanks and custom pieces for brands that refuse to compromise. MOQ from 50 pieces.

Why Pakistan for Streetwear Manufacturing?

Pakistan has emerged as a top destination for premium streetwear production. The country's long-staple cotton produces exceptionally soft yet durable fabrics. Labor costs are 30-40% lower than China for comparable quality, and the craftsmanship in garment-washing and finishing is world-class.

Our Streetwear Specialties

Heavyweight T-Shirts (220-300gsm)

Boxy, oversized fits with dropped shoulders. 100% cotton or cotton-poly blends. Garment-dyed for lived-in color. Reinforced neck seams and double-needle stitching throughout.

Premium Hoodies (320-400gsm)

French terry and fleece-lined options. Oversized fits, cropped styles, or standard retail cuts. Custom drawstrings, kangaroo pockets, and ribbed cuffs that hold their shape.

Joggers & Sweatpants

Tapered fit, straight leg, or wide-leg options. Elastic waistbands with drawstrings, cuffed or open ankles. Side pockets and back zip pockets available.

Specialty Finishes

  • Garment Washing: Enzyme wash, acid wash, vintage wash
  • Puff Print: Raised, textured ink for bold graphics
  • Cracked Print: Vintage distressed aesthetic
  • Reflective: 3M reflective details for techwear brands
  • Embossed/Debossed: Tonal texture without ink
  • Patch Work: Custom woven or leather patches

Join 500+ brands. Free mockup. Free sample. Quote in 24 hours. Your design is 100% confidential.

Frequently Asked Questions

What makes your streetwear different from basic blanks?

We use premium long-staple cotton, reinforced construction, and specialty garment-washing techniques that create a premium feel retail brands demand.

Can you do oversized/boxy fits?

Yes, oversized and boxy fits are our specialty. We customize patterns to achieve your exact desired silhouette.

Do you offer garment washing?

Yes — enzyme wash, acid wash, vintage wash, and mineral wash are all available.

What is the minimum for streetwear?

50 pieces per style, per color. You can mix sizes within the 50-piece minimum.

How do I start my streetwear brand with you?

Send us your designs or reference garments. We'll create a sample within 5-7 days for your approval.
